title: Procedural Character Generator
summary: Standalone tool inside the engine. Node-graph UI; emits a rigged + Mixamo-animatable mesh (human, robot, dog, spider, …) for use as a runtime asset. Tracked in its own backlog: docs/proposals/procedural-character-generator.md. Take it on once Beacon World gameplay v0 is stable; staffing it earlier blocks game progress.
